testcase.name: @BeforeClass setup
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.remote.UnreachableBrowserException: Error communicating with the remote browser. It may have died. Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23.0.2' Driver info: C:\Users\sibud\AppData\Loca...}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: Windows 10, proxy: Proxy(), se:bidiEnabled: false, se:cdp: ws://192.168.29.107:4444/se..., se:cdpVersion: 147.0.3912.60, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} at
